heading: Requirement to notify Coast Guard of release of objects into the navigable waters of the United States
label: 70013 Requirement to notify Coast Guard of release of objects into the navigable waters of the United States

children.heading: .—Requirement
children.label: a .—Requirement
children.text: As soon as a person has knowledge of any release from a vessel or facility into the navigable waters of the United States of any object that creates an obstruction prohibited under , popularly known as the Rivers and Harbors Appropriations Act of 1899 (), such person shall notify the Secretary and the Secretary of the Army of such release.section 10 of the Act of March 3, 189933 U.S.C. 403

children.heading: .—Restriction on Use of Notification
children.label: b .—Restriction on Use of Notification
children.text: Any notification provided by an individual in accordance with subsection (a) may not be used against such individual in any criminal case, except a prosecution for perjury or for giving a false statement.
